title: Memorandum of understanding (MoU) between the Competition and Markets Authority (CMA) and the Commissioner of Competition of Canada
body: "This MoU establishes a framework for coordination between the CMA and the Competition Bureau Canada (CCB), on matters including:    the notification and coordination of competition and consumer enforcement activities   the sharing of views and discussion and communication of information to facilitate each participant’s respective national competition laws and promote a better understanding of each other’s enforcement activities and policies   ensuring the confidentiality of information communicated under the MoU   allowing for the involvement of concurrent regulators in the cooperation envisaged under the arrangement and facilitation of a direct line of communication between the CCB and concurrent regulators   "
